alternative_parents.description: Organic compound containing an aniline group substituted at one or more positions by a methoxy group.
alternative_parents.name: Methoxyanilines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a benzene ring fused to a furan. Furan is a five-membered aromatic ring with four carbon atoms and one oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Benzofurans

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds contaning a phenoxy group.
alternative_parents.name: Phenoxy compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a methoxybenzene or a derivative thereof.
alternative_parents.name: Anisoles

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl aryl ether functional group with the generic formula R-O-R' , where R is an alkyl group and R' is an aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl aryl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the functional group with the general structure R-CS-NR'R, where R, R', and R are organic groups.
alternative_parents.name: Thioamides

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a furan ring, which is a five-member aromatic ring with one oxygen atom, four carbon atoms.
alternative_parents.name: Furans

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an amide of thiocarboxylic acid, with the general structure R1C(=S)N(R2)R3 (R1-R3=H, alkyl, aryl).
alternative_parents.name: Thiocarboxylic acid amides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one oxygen atom linked to a ring carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Oxacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a functional group with the general structure R1C(=S)R2 (R1, R2=H, alkyl, aryl).
alternative_parents.name: Thiocarbonyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
class.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as dimethoxybenzenes. These are organic aromatic compounds containing a monocyclic benzene moiety carrying exactly two methoxy groups.

direct_parent.description: Organic aromatic compounds containing a monocyclic benzene moiety carrying exactly two methoxy groups.
direct_parent.name: Dimethoxybenzenes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic aromatic compounds containing a monocyclic benzene moiety carrying exactly or one more methoxy groups.
subclass.name: Methoxybenzenes

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
